rulings.Case Title: SALLY LIU VS. SARAH ELIZABETH SHAPERO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 13, 2021 line 1. DEFENDANT SARAH SHAPERO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication Of Issues is continued to December 17, 2021. By no later than 9:30 a.m. on December 13, 2021 Plaintiff to file a declaration containing (1) transaction number for filing submission of John Liu Declaration referenced in opposition or (2) Filed Endorsed copy of John Liu Declaration. The Court will attempt to locate the declaration on file based on the transaction number, if any or based on the Filed Endorsed Copy. If no Declaration of John Liu was timely filed in opposition to this motion Plaintiff shall file a declaration so stating. On November 22, 2021 under transaction number 100147913 Plaintiff filed 9 documents including two 266-page declarations by Sally Liu and no declaration by John Liu. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM BYERLY VS. 2100 GREEN STREET, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File 4th Amended Complaint

rulings.Case Title: PETER DINH VS. ROB MILLS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees For Prevailing On Plainitff Peter Dinhs Motion To Set Aside Slapp Orders
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 13, 2021 line 4. DEFENDANT ROB MILLS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees For Prevailing On Plainitff Peter Dinhs Motion To Set Aside Slapp Orders is granted in the amount of $16,147.50. Defendant is entitled to recover its fees. The Court has not previously ruled on this issue as this issue has not been previously properly presented to the Court on a motion. Opposing party fails to point to any unnecessary or unreasonable work or to show why hourly rate requested is not proper. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). rulings.Case Title: JIMMY CHERRY JR VS. WINDY R BRYANT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories Set One Compelling Responses To Special Interrogatories Set One And Set Two Compelling Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents Set One Deeming Matters Specified In Requests For Admission Admitted And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 13, 2021 line 7. DEFENDANT WINDY CHERRY Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories Set One Compelling Responses To Special Interrogatories Set One And Set Two Compelling Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents Set One Deeming Matters Specified In Requests For Admission Admitted And Imposing Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admission are deemed admitted. Complete verified responses without objections to Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories and Requests for Production to be served no later than December 17, 2021. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,100 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
